summary: Frontend-only end-to-end test of the Django Academy/Finance/HR ERP. Login (valid + invalid), dashboard KPIs + header, sidebar nav, all 18 list pages, students create+search+detail, class create+persist, school profile load+save, salary 'Mark Paid' -> Expense auto-create, leave approve, users page, logout, Django admin reachable, finance report (YTD income/expenses/net/donations/categories), and invoice payment flow tested. 2 bugs found: (1) /api/invoices/ returned 500 due to malformed template tag (FIXED in template), (2) Recording a payment on an invoice does NOT persist (form keeps amount_paid at 0) - likely because FeePaymentForm exposes the 'invoice' field but the view sets it programmatically, so form validation fails silently. Several minor data-testid naming mismatches vs spec.

critical.issue: Returned HTTP 500 (ValueError: Need 2 values to unpack in for loop) due to a stray `{% for s,label in 'all,All|...'|cut:' '|slice:'' %}` template tag in templates/erp/invoice_list.html (line 10). The iterable evaluates to a string of characters, so each item is 1 char and cannot unpack into (s,label). FIXED by removing the dead loop line. Backend was restarted. Page now returns 200.

Submitting the payment form on an unpaid invoice (e.g. id=2, balance=850.00) with amount=850 does NOT persist. After POST the page re-renders the same invoice with amount_paid still 0.00 and no 'Fully Paid' indicator. The view's redirect to invoice_detail isn't reached -> form.is_valid() is False. ROOT CAUSE: FeePaymentForm (erp/forms.py:71) only does exclude=['received_by'], so the `invoice` FK field is still rendered + required. The invoice_detail.html loops over all form fields and the template does include the invoice <select>, but Django's `form.is_valid()` requires the user to pick one. Since `payment.invoice = invoice` is only set after .is_valid(), the form silently fails when invoice isn't selected. Fix: add 'invoice' to FeePaymentForm.Meta.exclude (also 'received_by'), OR set initial={'invoice': invoice} in the view, OR hide the invoice field in the template.

minor.issue: Income by Source breakdown shows only 'Donation' even though fee-payment income rows exist on /api/incomes/. Worth verifying Income.source choices align with the report's group_by key (e.g., 'fees' vs 'Fees Collected').

ui_bugs.issue: Branding panel shows 'Academy ERP' instead of the requested school name 'Instituto São João de Brito'. School name only appears after login (sidebar/header). The login screen should also surface the configured school name.
The 'Invoice' select is rendered in the payment form even though it is conceptually fixed by the URL. This both causes silent validation failure AND is confusing UX.

integration_issues.issue: Payment submission silently fails -> amount_paid not updated, status not changed, Income ledger row not created (for THIS new payment). Existing seeded incomes are unaffected.

issues: cdn.tailwindcss.com used in production (console warning on every page). Should be replaced with a built Tailwind asset for performance/CSP, but not blocking.
Spec asked for data-testid='nav-academic-years' but template uses 'nav-years'.
Spec asked for data-testid='nav-school-profile' but template uses 'nav-school'.
Spec asked for data-testid='nav-logout' — sidebar uses a standalone 'logout-btn' (which works); there is no nav-logout. Either rename, or add an alias to match the spec/test contract.

action_items: [HIGH] Fix FeePaymentForm so the payment POST actually persists: set Meta.exclude = ['received_by','invoice'] (or hide the field in invoice_detail.html and inject it server-side). Re-test that amount_paid increments, status flips to 'paid' on full payment, and an Income row is created.
[HIGH] Investigate Income.source='fees' so /api/reports/finance/ Income-by-Source breakdown surfaces fee income alongside donations.
[MEDIUM] Rename sidebar data-testids to match spec: nav-years -> nav-academic-years, nav-school -> nav-school-profile, add nav-logout (or update the spec/test contract).
[LOW] Use the configured School.name on the login page brand panel so 'Instituto São João de Brito' appears pre-login.
[LOW] Replace cdn.tailwindcss.com with a built Tailwind asset to silence the production warning.
critical_code_review_comments: templates/erp/invoice_list.html line 10 contained dead/broken template code (`{% for s,label in 'all,All|...'|cut:' '|slice:'' %}{% endfor %}`) that caused a 500. Removed.
erp/forms.py FeePaymentForm should not expose the `invoice` FK when the URL already binds it (silent validation failure).

erp/views.py invoice_detail() should at minimum render form errors visibly (template loop renders {{ field.errors }} but the failure was invisible to the user — no top-of-form non-field error summary).
Tailwind via CDN script tag in dashboard_base.html will be flagged by browser consoles in production.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (login, dashboard, all list pages, students/class CRUD, school profile, salary pay, leave approve, logout, admin all work; invoice payment + finance-report income-by-source broken)

test_credentials: admin / admin123 (used). Also seeded: accountant/password123, hr/password123, principal/password123
seed_data_creation: Created one class via UI: name='TEST_Class_Z' section='Z' (persisted, visible in /api/classes/). No cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice list 500 bug is already fixed in templates/erp/invoice_list.html. The remaining critical bug is in erp/forms.py FeePaymentForm – the `invoice` field must be excluded so payments submitted from /api/invoices/<id>/ actually persist. To repro: login admin/admin123 -> /api/invoices/?status=pending -> open first invoice -> fill amount with balance -> click Record Payment. Currently page reloads with no change. Once fixed, verify (a) amount_paid updates, (b) status flips to 'paid' on full payment, (c) Income row auto-created, (d) /api/reports/finance/ Income-by-Source shows fee income too.

rca_of_the_issues./api/invoices/ 500: templates/erp/invoice_list.html line 10 had `{% for s,label in 'all,All|pending,Pending|partial,Partial|paid,Paid|overdue,Overdue'|cut:' '|slice:'' %}{% endfor %}`. The `|slice:''` returns the original string; iterating yields single characters; Django can't unpack into (s,label). Removed the line — only static <a> chips below are needed. Fix verified after `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` (Django was still holding the cached template compile error in the process).
rca_of_the_issues.Record Payment silently fails: erp/forms.py FeePaymentForm Meta exclude=['received_by'] but NOT 'invoice'. The form therefore requires the user to pick an invoice, even though the view fixes it from the URL via `payment.invoice = invoice` AFTER `.is_valid()`. Fix: exclude 'invoice' too (or hide the field). Mitigation: also show non_field errors on the page so silent failures don't happen.
